overview: Jund Sacrifice is a midrange archetype that leverages creature sacrifice to generate card advantage and direct damage. By cycling threats through Witch's Oven and Cauldron Familiar, the deck maintains board control while applying consistent pressure. Mayhem Devil serves as both an aggressive finisher and a versatile removal spell.
win_conditions: Combat damage from Mayhem Devil and other creatures
Card advantage leading to board overwhelm

keep_criteria: Hands containing Mayhem Devil or cheap creatures
Hands with at least two mana sources
Keep hands with 2-3 lands, Cauldron Familiar, Witch's Oven, or early threats like Bloodtithe Harvester.
Keep discard (Thoughtseize/Liliana) if paired with a land.
mulligan_criteria: Hands with no removal or threats
Mulligan on 1-land hands, triple-colored mana without lands, or hands lacking early plays and no way to generate mana.

early_game: Deploy cheap creatures to establish a board presence
Prioritize playing Witch's Oven or similar outlets
Use early sac triggers to draw into key cards
Turn 1: Play a land, cast Cauldron Familiar or Bloodtithe Harvester if mana allows.
Turn 2: Play a second land, sacrifice Familiar for {R}{G}, cast Witch's Oven or another threat.
Prioritize playing lands to ensure sacrifice outlets can be activated on curve.
Sequence mana carefully to avoid dead turns.
mid_game: Cycle opponent's threats through Cauldron Familiar
Cast Mayhem Devil for removal and pressure
Balance direct damage with board development
Treat creatures as resources, not just threats.
Sacrifice only when it generates immediate value (mana for threats, card draw, or damage).
Preserve graveyard resources if possible, but be ready to play around Rest in Peace.
Maintain hand size with discard and card draw
never let your hand empty without a clear win condition.
Commit threats when you have protection (discard, removal) or when the opponent is tapped out.
late_game: Leverage accumulated card advantage to out-resource opponents
Use Witch's Oven to clear blockers or finish the game
Maintain sac outlets to keep drawing cards
Mayhem Devil (haste, unblockable), Witch's Oven + sacrifice outlet for infinite damage/mana, Liliana's ultimate, or unblockable threats.
Secure the win by attacking with haste creatures or using Oven to swing for lethal.
Go all-in when you have a clear path to damage, the opponent is tapped out, or you can protect your win condition with discard/removal.
Commit when you've established board control and have the resources to follow up.

key_cards.name: Mayhem Devil
key_cards.notes: Cast early to apply pressure or use as a targeted removal spell; the life loss is a manageable tempo trade.

key_cards.name: Cauldron Familiar
key_cards.notes: Deploy to fuel Witch's Oven; sacrifice opponent's creatures or your own beaters to draw cards and maintain tempo.

key_cards.name: Witch's Oven
key_cards.notes: Use to trigger Cauldron Familiar, remove threats, or deal direct damage; prioritize high-value targets before combat.

sequencing_tips: Hold sacrifice outlets until you can trigger them for maximum value
Use Witch's Oven to remove threats before they attack or block
Trigger Cauldron Familiar on opponent's creatures to gain card advantage
Cast Mayhem Devil when you need immediate board impact or removal
Common mistakes include over-sacrificing early, forgetting to protect Witch's Oven, and mismanaging mana for sacrifice outlets.
Unique interactions: Oven + Cauldron Familiar/Bloodtithe Harvester creates infinite sacrifice for mana or damage.
Mayhem Devil's haste makes it a surprise attacker.
Always track opponent's hate cards and adjust your game plan accordingly.

matchups.advice: Prioritize early sacrifice outlets and use Witch's Oven to remove key attackers.
Apply steady pressure with Mayhem Devil and use sac engine to out-draw their resources.
Mirror match dynamics favor efficient sequencing and card advantage generation.
Use multiple threats to force counter trade-offs. Sacrifice outlets for mana to cast around counters. Use discard to remove counterspells or protect your threats.
Apply early pressure to punish their slow start. Use discard to remove mana dorks. Bring in hate cards (Rest in Peace, Leyline of Punishment) and sweepers to clear their board.
Win the discard war. Protect your Witch's Oven. Use Rest in Peace to shut down their graveyard. Out-value with better sequencing and card advantage.

common_threats: Watch for sweepers (Wrath of God, Anger of the Gods), hate cards (Rest in Peace, Leyline of Punishment), and counters.
Note when opponents tap out for big spells or leave mana open for protection.
Track graveyard contents to anticipate Rest in Peace or graveyard recursion.
